// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: HashTableCompact
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Auto)]
    private struct E
    {
        internal double Key;
        internal ulong HashCode;
        internal E(double key, ulong hashCode)
        {
            Key = key;
        HashCode = hashCode;
    }
    };

    private static readonly byte[] _bucketStarts = new byte[] {
        0, 2, 2, 2
    };

    private static readonly byte[] _bucketCounts = new byte[] {
        2, 0, 0, 2
    };

    private static readonly E[] _entries = {
        new E(0.0, ulong.MinValue), new E(1.0, 4607182418800017408ul), new E(double.MinValue, 18442240474082181119ul), new E(double.MaxValue, 9218868437227405311ul)
    };

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static ulong Hash(double value)
    {
        ulong bits = Unsafe.ReadUnaligned<ulong>(ref Unsafe.As<double, byte>(ref value));

        if (((bits - 1) & ~(0x8000_0000_0000_0000)) >= 0x7FF0_0000_0000_0000)
            bits &= 0x7FF0_0000_0000_0000;

        return bits;
    }

    
    public static bool Contains(double key)
    {


        ulong hash = Hash(key);
        int index = (int)(hash % 4);
        int start = (int)_bucketStarts[index];
        int count = (int)_bucketCounts[index];
        int end = start + count;

        for (int i = start; i < end; i++)
        {
            ref E entry = ref _entries[i];

            if (entry.HashCode == hash && entry.Key == key)
                return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 4;
    public const double MinKey = double.MinValue;
    public const double MaxKey = double.MaxValue;
}
